features.featureTitle: Rename all user-facing occurrences of 'cleaning' (and its variants: 'Cleaning', 'CLEANING', 'cleaning tool', 'Cleaning Tool', 'cleaning done', 'Cleaning Done', 'last cleaned', 'Last Cleaned', 'next due', 'Machine Cleaning Tracker', etc.) to use 'Machine Part' terminology throughout the frontend UI. For example: 'Cleaning Tool' → 'Machine Part', 'Cleaning Done' → 'Machine Part Done', 'Last Cleaned' → 'Last Replaced', 'Next Due' → 'Next Due', page title 'Machine Cleaning Tracker' → 'Machine Part Tracker', button labels, card labels, modal titles, form field labels, banner text, and stats bar labels must all reflect the new naming.
